# Acta by Found

> Acta by Found builds websites, branding, and local search presence made specifically for lawyers and notaries in Belgium. A specialist branch of Found, a Belgian marketing agency.

Acta does not build generic small-business websites. It builds the website, brand identity, local SEO, and social presence that Belgian law firms and notary offices need — designed around the specific advertising rules and public-trust expectations of legal professionals, not a copy-pasted template.

## Primary pages

- [Homepage](https://actabyfound.be/): the case for why most Belgian law firms and notary offices are invisible online, and what Acta builds to fix that.
- [Services](https://actabyfound.be/services/): website, branding, local SEO, and social media — the four-part system, and what's included in each.
- [Contact](https://actabyfound.be/contact/): how to reach Acta.

## Blog

- [Blog index](https://actabyfound.be/blog/): guidance on websites, branding, and local SEO written for legal professionals.
- [What Belgian Lawyers and Notaries Can (and Can't) Say on Their Website](https://actabyfound.be/blog/website-rules-for-belgian-lawyers-and-notaries/): how the Ordre des barreaux (lawyers) and Fednot (notaries) advertising rules differ, and what that means for site content.

## Languages

This site is also published in French (https://actabyfound.be/fr/) and Dutch (https://actabyfound.be/nl/), each written natively for its market rather than translated.

## Parent organization

Acta is a specialist branch of [Found](https://foundagency.be/), a Belgian marketing agency.
